query:

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS realism_bundle_json TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS benchmark_bundle_json TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consensus_result_json TEXT;
